# Issue Templates — PRIME v2

Use these templates when creating issues in GitHub Issues (or your team's tracker). Fill every field. No blank placeholders in submitted issues.

---

## Bug Report

```text
**Title:** [BUG] Short description

**Phase:** [0–20]
**Severity:** Critical / High / Medium / Low
**Reported by:** [Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

### What happened?
[Exact description]

### Expected behavior
[What should have happened]

### Steps to reproduce
1.
2.
3.

### Environment
- OS:
- Browser:
- Branch:

### Logs / screenshot
[Paste here]
```

---

## Feature Request

```text
**Title:** [FEATURE] Short description

**Phase:** [Must be Phase 6+ — no features before coding starts]
**Requested by:** [Name / Role]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Priority:** High / Medium / Low

### Problem this solves
[What user need does this address?]

### Proposed solution
[What should it do?]

### Roles affected
[e.g. Applicant, RTEC Member]

### Acceptance criteria
- [ ]
- [ ]

### Out of scope
[What this does NOT include]

### Reference
[Link to README section or user story ID]
```

---

## Documentation Task

```text
**Title:** [DOCS] Short description

**Phase:** [0–5]
**Assigned to:** [Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD

### File to create or update
[Path, e.g. docs/requirements/RISK-REGISTER.md]

### Why needed
[What gate or decision does this unlock?]

### Source material
[e.g. README.md §10]

### Done when
- [ ] File created at correct path
- [ ] No placeholder text remaining
- [ ] Reviewed by [Name]
- [ ] Approved by [Name / Role]
```

---

## Phase Gate Review

```text
**Title:** [PHASE GATE] Phase [N] — Approval Request

**Phase:** [N]
**Submitted by:** [Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Approver:** [Project Owner / Business Owner / Product Owner / Security Owner / Process Owner]

### Summary
[One paragraph: what was completed]

### Deliverables
- [ ] [File] — [link]
- [ ] [File] — [link]

### Open items
| Item | Owner | Due |
| --- | --- | --- |

### Approver sign-off
Approved by: _______________  Date: _______________
```
